title: Icon groups — semantic group catalogue
description: Schema for components/src/icon-groups.json — maps each icon slug to one or more semantic groups (Connector, Status, Common, …). Key order in this file is meaningful: the first-listed group containing an icon becomes its primary group during derive; later groups become secondaryGroups. Hand-maintained from the Figma file's Icons page (Actual icons layout frame). The optional `_regen` block records provenance (D4 from R6).

_schema_version.description: Substrate schema version. Pinned at 1; bump only on a schema-incompatible change to the file shape.

_regen.description: Optional provenance block describing how this file is regenerated. See $defs.regenBlock.

_naming_convention.description: Free-form prose documenting the key-order primary-priority rule (first-listed group wins).
examples: Maps icon slugs to one or more semantic groups; first-listed group becomes primary.

_generated_from.description: Free-form prose recording the Figma source. Superseded by the structured `_regen` block (D4); kept for backwards-compatible prose context. Removal is a deferred follow-up (P5 additive in this PR).
examples: Figma file l8biHxfarNi1I2RMvVxVOK Icons page; manually curated 2026-05-13.

^[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9 ]*$.description: Group entry: an array of icon slugs belonging to the named semantic group. The group name is the property key (capitalized, e.g. `Connector`, `Status`, `Field type`).

items.description: Icon slug — lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens. Matches the icon's name in the DS Icons page.

regenBlock.description: Structured provenance block describing how this file is regenerated (or that it is hand-curated). Shared across Class C JSONs in this substrate.

source.description: Where the canonical content of this file comes from. `manual` = hand-curated; `figma` = synced from a Figma node; `ai-assisted` = LLM-generated with human review.

lastSync.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent sync from `source`. Set by sync tooling for `figma`/`ai-assisted` sources; omit for `manual`.

instructions.description: Free-form prose telling a human author or AI assistant how to update this file responsibly. Surfaced by the Knowledge Editor's 'Regenerate with AI' seam.
examples: Re-sync when icon groups are added/removed in Figma.

nodeId.description: Figma node id (with a colon separator), when source = `figma`.
